prestazioni: Replace the stock TZ181DDT 1.5L turbocharged inline-4 (138 hp, 220 Nm) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbo (0.83 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) paired with a custom 3.5" V-band downpipe and a PTP 400-cell catalytic converter for optimized spool and 300+ hp potential on E30 ethanol blend.

Install a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom CAN bus integration for the Funky Cat's BYD Blade battery management system, enabling full torque vectoring control via a KW Automotive Clubsport coilover kit (adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height drop) and a Cusco 22mm rear sway bar.

Upgrade the stock single-clutch e-axle with a dual-motor AEM EV VCU-controlled setup (front: BorgWarner HVH250-115, rear: BorgWarner HVH250-090) on a custom subframe, paired with a GKN eTransmission 2-speed gearbox and a PWR radiator for sustained 450 kW (600+ hp) output.
estetica: Fit a Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (custom-fabricated for the Funky Cat's 2,650mm wheelbase) with carbon fiber overfenders, a 30mm front lip, and a 50mm ducktail spoiler, all finished in 3M Gloss Flip Psychedelic Purple.

Replace the stock LED headlights with Osram Night Breaker Laser H7 bulbs in custom Hella Dynamic Light System projectors, paired with a Morimoto XB LED fog light conversion and a custom CNC-machined aluminum grille insert (brushed finish, ORA logo laser-etched).

Install a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (235/40/18 front, 265/35/18 rear), paired with D2 Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers and 355mm two-piece rotors (slotted, zinc-coated).
